sourcePrompt: A field medical aid station tent about six meters long. A canvas field tent with both entrance flaps tied wide open revealing folding cots and stacked medical chests inside, a large red cross on white painted on the roof and another on the side wall, guy ropes staked out, and supply crates by the entrance. Olive-drab canvas and red crosses, a place of triage.
handEdit: whole tent yawed -90deg: ridge now along Z, entrance +Z, matching old TIJ asset orientation (placements assume it)
